title: PND's Dungeon Essentials
description: A 1.21 skyblock modpack based soley for dungeons!
body: **PND's Dungeon Essentials** is a brand new modpack from Potatoes Never Die, based soley for dungeons. It gets rid of a bunch of unneeded mods and only has FPS boosting mods and mods that are useful for playing dungeons whether it be F1 or M7. If you like this ack then you should definitely check out my other [skyblock pack!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pnd-skyblock-modpack)!
